Function reference

Colour Palette

colour() color()
Colour Palette
info()
Information
ramp()
Colour Ramp
scale_colour_picker() scale_color_picker() scale_fill_picker() scale_edge_colour_picker() scale_edge_color_picker() scale_edge_fill_picker()
Colour Scale Builder

Qualitative Colour Schemes

scale_colour_land() scale_color_land() scale_fill_land() scale_edge_colour_land() scale_edge_color_land() scale_edge_fill_land()
AVHRR Global Land Cover Classification Colour Scheme for ggplot2 and ggraph
scale_colour_logical() scale_color_logical() scale_fill_logical()
Binary Discrete Colour Schemes for ggplot2 and ggraph
scale_colour_okabeito() scale_color_okabeito() scale_fill_okabeito() scale_edge_colour_okabeito() scale_edge_color_okabeito() scale_edge_fill_okabeito()
Okabe and Ito's Discrete Color Scheme for ggplot2 and ggraph
scale_colour_soil() scale_color_soil() scale_fill_soil() scale_edge_colour_soil() scale_edge_color_soil() scale_edge_fill_soil()

Diagnostic Tools

compare()
Colour Difference
convert()
Simulate Colour-Blindness
plot(<colour_scheme>) plot_scheme() plot_map() plot_tiles() plot_scheme_colourblind() plot_scheme_colorblind()
Plot Color Scheme

On this page

khroma is a part of the tesselle project, a collection of packages for research and teaching in archaeology. Learn more at tesselle.org.

Developed by Nicolas Frerebeau.

Site built with pkgdown 2.0.7.
